concept.name: grid-template-columns
concept.explain:
Use grid-template-columns to control the width of each column in the grid.

Example:
grid-template-columns: 180px 120px 100px 80px 60px 40px 20px;

This makes each column a different width, with the first column being the widest and the last column being the narrowest.

ui.prompt: Goal: Keep the car in the same place and resize all columns so they are the same width.
hints: Use grid-template-columns to change column widths.
Only the first column needs to become wider.

entities.baseCss: background: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.22); outline: 2px dashed rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.8); border-radius: 10px; min-width: 180px; justify-self: start;

concept.name: grid-template-rows
concept.explain:
Use grid-template-rows to control the height of each row in the grid.

Example:
grid-template-rows: 60px 170px 60px 60px 60px 60px;

This makes the second row taller while the other rows stay the same height.

ui.prompt: Goal: Keep the car in the same place and resize the second row so it fills the tall parking bay.
hints: Use grid-template-rows to change row heights.
Only the second row needs to become taller.

entities.baseCss: background: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.22); outline: 2px dashed rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.8); border-radius: 10px; min-height: 170px; align-self: start;

concept.name: repeat()
concept.explain:
Use repeat() to write repeated track sizes more easily.

Example:
grid-template-columns: 120px repeat(7, 80px);

This creates 7 equal columns without typing 80px seven times.

ui.prompt: Goal: Build equal column tracks using repeat() while keeping the car where it is.
hints: Use repeat() to create the same column size multiple times.

entities.baseCss: background: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.22); outline: 2px dashed rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.8); border-radius: 10px;

concept.name: grid-template-columns + grid-template-rows
concept.explain:
Use grid-template-columns and grid-template-rows together to control the size of the grid in both directions.

This lets one parking bay become wider and taller at the same time.

ui.prompt: Goal: Keep the car in the same place and resize the second column and second row to match the larger parking bay.
hints: The second column and second row should be larger.

entities.baseCss: background: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.22); outline: 2px dashed rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.8); border-radius: 10px; min-width: 150px; min-height: 150px; justify-self: start; align-self: start;
